title: Spatial proteomics of single cells and organelles on tissue slides using filter-aided expansion proteomics.
author: Dong Z Jiang W Wu C Chen T Chen J Ding X Zheng S Piatkevich KD Zhu Y Guo T
content: S-EPMC11525631 PMC11525631 Spatial proteomics of single cells and organelles on tissue slides using filter-aided expansion proteomics. Hydrogel-based tissue expansion combined with mass spectrometry (MS) offers an emerging spatial proteomics approach. Here, we present a filter-aided expansion
